description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and a matte black barrel, designed for precision shooting. The rifle features a long, slender barrel and a mounted telescopic scope for enhanced accuracy at distance. The stock is ergonomically shaped with a cheek rest and a rubberized buttpad for comfort and recoil absorption. The trigger guard and magazine well are integrated into the lower receiver, with a visible bolt handle for manual cycling. The scope is mounted on the top rail, and the rifle lacks any visible iron sights. The overall finish is a combination of wood grain and matte black metal, giving it a classic yet functional appearance.
description: A bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock, matte black barrel, and mounted telescopic scope, designed for precision shooting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel profile and the scope aligned above the receiver.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, scope, and bolt handle.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock, cheek rest, and the alignment of the scope.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bolt handle, trigger guard, and the overall length of the rifle.
